title: salix × hachiojiensis
intro: Salix × hachiojiensis, also known as the Hachioji willow, is a hybrid plant species within the Salix genus of willows, resulting from the cross between Salix japonica and Salix babylonica. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Salix × hachiojiensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and arthritis. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
